Endpoint Management → Cloud & DevOps

Vinay Mehta
building toward Azure DevOps.

Intune Engineer/Azure Enthusiast/Future Cloud & DevOps Engineer

I manage enterprise endpoints for a global retail account at Wipro, and I'm converting that hands-on infrastructure discipline into cloud automation, containers, and CI/CD — one deployment at a time.

See my work Get in touch
vinay@career — transition.sh
bash RUNNING
01 · About

From locked-down devices to open infrastructure.

The same discipline that keeps enterprise endpoints compliant is what I bring to building and automating cloud systems.

I'm an Endpoint Management Engineer at Wipro, working within the CIS-DWS domain on the METRO AG account, where I handle Microsoft Intune administration, device lifecycle management, and compliance policy enforcement across a large enterprise fleet.

Alongside my day-to-day role, I'm deliberately building toward Azure DevOps Engineering — learning Linux, Docker, Git, Python, and shell scripting, and applying automation thinking to problems I used to solve manually through a console.

I like systems that are predictable, documented, and repeatable — whether that's a compliance policy rollout or a CI/CD pipeline.

4+ years of consistent training. I approach the gym the way I approach infrastructure — track everything, apply progressive overload, and iterate deliberately toward a lean, structured physique.
